daily.today_energy: Your magnetic pull is stronger than usual—people are drawn to your authenticity today. Channel this into genuine connections and watch how naturally things align for you.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, your heart's asking for real talk. Don't settle for surface-level vibes; go deeper with someone who gets your actual self.
daily.career: Your creative instincts are on point right now. Trust that idea you've been sitting on—it's worth bringing to the table. Your confidence is your biggest asset today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever brings you joy. Energy flows where intention goes, so be intentional about self-care.

weekly.overview: Leo, this week's cosmic energy is asking you to slow down and listen to your intuition. You're naturally magnetic, but the universe is inviting you to share vulnerability too. That's where real magic happens.
weekly.love: Venus is dancing in your sector of authentic connection. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is about being real rather than performing. Let someone see the messy, unfiltered version of you. That's the invitation.
weekly.career: Mercury's influence suggests your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't dim your vision to fit someone else's expectations. Trust that your perspective has value, even if it takes time for others to catch up.
weekly.health: Your energy thrives when you're creating or moving your body in ways that feel good, not obligatory. This week, tune into what genuinely energizes you rather than forcing routines. Your body knows what it needs.
